news_results.title: Market analysts spar as bitcoin heads for worst five-month losing streak since 2018
news_results.description: Down more than 50% from its peak, bitcoin is diverging from stocks as geopolitical tensions, tariffs and ETF outflows deepen its slump, analysts told CoinDesk.
